expectations.text: Mode identified as DESIGN; emits the design-doc template (10 sections)
expectations.evidence: States 'Mode: DESIGN'; all 10 template sections present (Personas … Success metrics) plus the anti-pattern appendix and flagged open questions.

expectations.text: Produces an explicit anomaly->root-cause drill spine, not a flat set of charts
expectations.evidence: §6 lays out the spine incident header -> cohort heatmap (where) -> delivery+pacing+supply (how) -> allocation diff+reservation (what) -> forecast bias (why) -> one of four named causes.

expectations.text: Why-underdeliver sequence pairs the delivery curve with a pacing trace and distinguishes forecast-low / exhaustion / supply-shortfall / allocation-failure
expectations.evidence: Workflow A + the supply triptych (forecasted vs available vs allocated) explicitly split the four causes; pacing trace stacked beneath the delivery curve on a shared x-axis.

expectations.text: Includes an allocation Sankey with a drill target
expectations.evidence: §4 'Allocation-flow Sankey' — supply pools -> demand cohorts, link width = volume, color = reservation state; drill to reservation breakdown for the link.

expectations.text: Anomalies overlaid on metrics (not a separate tab); replans as event markers
expectations.evidence: Anomaly windows overlaid via markArea/markPoint on the Tier-2 charts; dedicated replan timeline with attributed event markers (OB5).

expectations.text: Addresses 20k-cohort scale (virtualization / server-side aggregation / query-key scoping)
expectations.evidence: §7: server-side ClickHouse bucketing for the heatmap, react-virtual for the cohort table, panel-scoped query keys, 1-min rollups, refresh discipline, lttb sampling.

expectations.text: Walks the anti-pattern appendix; no pie / dead-end overview / mean-only latency
expectations.evidence: Full appendix walks CH/SD/EX/OB/IN/IM/AC/EXEC; allocation diff is a diverging bar not pies, every panel drills (no SD4), latency p50/p95/p99 not mean (OB1).
